Portfolio

Featured Projects

Here are some of my recent projects that showcase my skills in full-stack development.

Water Level Monitoring

A comprehensive water level monitoring system built with React Native. Features include real-time WebSocket data streaming, push notifications for critical alerts, historical data visualization, and user management. The app connects to IoT sensors deployed across various water bodies, providing instant updates to stakeholders.

Key Features:

  • Real-time WebSocket data streaming
  • Push notifications for alerts
  • Historical data visualization
  • User authentication and roles
  • Offline data caching
React Native TypeScript WebSocket Node.js
View Demo GitHub

HRIS System

A full-featured HR management system built with Laravel. Includes comprehensive payroll management with tax calculations, attendance tracking with biometric integration, leave management, performance reviews, and employee self-service portal. The system serves multiple departments and handles complex organizational structures.

Key Features:

  • Payroll management with tax calculations
  • Attendance tracking with biometric integration
  • Leave management system
  • Employee self-service portal
  • Performance review module
Laravel PHP PostgreSQL Bootstrap
View Demo GitHub

AIS Nelayan

An innovative vessel tracking system for Indonesian fishermen. Processes AIS (Automatic Identification System) data to track vessels in real-time. Features include interactive map visualization, geofencing for fishing zones, alert system for unauthorized entries, and vessel fleet management.

Key Features:

  • Real-time vessel tracking
  • Interactive map with Mapbox
  • Geofencing for fishing zones
  • Alert system for violations
  • Vessel fleet management
Next.js Mapbox Redis Docker
View Demo GitHub

FreshRSS Pipeline

A personalized RSS aggregation system with AI enhancement. Automatically fetches articles from multiple sources, generates AI-powered summaries, and delivers relevant content via Telegram. Built with Python, ChromaDB for vector search, and Docker for deployment.

Key Features:

  • Multi-source RSS aggregation
  • AI-powered article summaries
  • Telegram notification integration
  • Vector search with ChromaDB
  • Dockerized deployment
Python ChromaDB Docker OpenAI
View Demo GitHub
